description: Dotfiles commit-and-push is triggered manually via verbatim prompt pasted into sessions, despite an existing daily cron
Autodoro pomodoro tool requires recurring manual restarts, config tweaks, and exclusion fixes across many sessions
Kindle/Calibre connectivity requires re-solving udev rules and GVFS conflicts that were previously fixed but not persisted durably
Disk space investigations (pip cache, stale venvs, model files) done manually and reactively rather than via periodic cleanup
Browser extension release cycle for Intender involves manual asset generation, store listing updates, and version bumps across multiple sessions
